name: deleteRange
description: Deletes content within a character range [startIndex, endIndex) from a document. Use readDocument with format='json' to determine index positions.

documentId.description: The document ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Docs URL.

startIndex.description: 1-based character index within the document body. The start of the range to delete (inclusive).

endIndex.description: 1-based character index within the document body. The end of the range to delete (exclusive).

tabId.description: The ID of the specific tab to delete from. If not specified, deletes from the first tab (or legacy document.body for documents without tabs).
